Container.Name: Sentinel-DB
Container.Overview:
PostgreSQL database for Sentinel — the Plex data vault. This is the storage layer only; install this first, then Sentinel-Collector and Sentinel-API. All three containers together make up the Sentinel stack.
Part of the LFFPicard homelab ecosystem: https://github.com/LFFPicard
Container.Requires: Install this container first, before Sentinel-Collector and Sentinel-API.

Config.Name: Data Path
Config.Description: Where PostgreSQL stores the database files

Config.Name: Postgres Password
Config.Description: Database password — set a strong password. You will need this exact value when configuring Sentinel-Collector and Sentinel-API.
